description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow surrounded by several mature trees and a small detached shed. The building features a flat, light gray roof and a prominent front porch that spans the width of the structure, supported by columns. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior walls are finished in a clean, white facade with dark window frames and accents. A paved walkway leads from the street to the main entrance, and the landscaping includes a mix of shrubs and trees, creating a suburban residential feel. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with a focus on geometric lines and open outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat roof, wide front porch, and symmetrical windows, surrounded by trees and a small shed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement, with trees and a shed in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the porch, the shed, and the driveway extending to the right.
description_view_2: Street-facing view with a clear look at the front porch, walkway, and evenly spaced trees on both sides.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the bungalow, more trees, and the shed positioned further away.
